issues.detail: Skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: batch-retarget-and-export-fbx
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but omits setting frame_start/frame_end; Response B is empty.

scenarios.name: camera-solve-and-export-bvh
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers more rubric items (loading, configuring, solving, exporting with rotate_mode='NATIVE') than Response A, though both miss key steps like setup_tracking_scene, baking, and error threshold check.
